basic_details.job_title: IGH Dwarka Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Hospital Dwarka (IGH Dwarka) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 3 Senior Resident Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae., MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis qualification can directly attend the interview on 02-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Delhi only), 5 years for SC/ST

qualification.education_qualification: MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae., MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis
qualification.details: Obs. & Gynae.: MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae. Radio-diagnosis: MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IGH Dwarka Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at Indira Gandhi Hospital Dwarka is scheduled for 02 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by IGH Dwarka?
faq.answer: Indira Gandhi Hospital Dwarka has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the Senior Resident positions. These vacancies are distributed across different specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident posts, candidates need to possess MS/DNB/Diploma in Obs. & Gynae. for the Obs. & Gynae. position, and MD/DNB/Diploma in Radio-diagnosis for the Radio-diagnosis position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident positions at IGH Dwarka?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IGH Dwarka Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the Senior Resident posts in the IGH Dwarka recruitment. Candidates from all categories can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident positions will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67700 to Rs. 208700 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the IGH Dwarka Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the walk-in interview on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the IGH Dwarka Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts at IGH Dwarka will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for IGH Dwarka Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indira Gandhi Hospital Dwarka, New Delhi, 110077. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IGH Dwarka Recruitment 2026?
